parameters: The demons lost many of their brethren. They lost friends they
had known for hundreds of years. They were wrapped in a far
Deathpolca lost one of her closest friends and was betrayed by the
Yet they decided to overcome the path of destruction that had
been written in the book of prophecy. They chose a path that
And so, as though its mission was complete, the book of prophecy
What would happen next, no one knew.
\#The demons walk the path opposite history.
A connection between the former manager and Ange was found.
Left alone, he may someday pose a threat again, so the demons
They used all their abilities and contacts to scour the continent and
gather information, but locating one who worked behind the scenes
Meanwhile, in the dungeon and cut off from the outside world,
Ange stared at the chipped bricks making up the wall in a daze,
Time passed... A few months after the demons went berserk,
Bohelos's reconstruction was completed, and promising news
It had been three years since their fight began. Three years had
passed since the demons first appeared.
The Magic Cannon... The Empire denied involvement in the incident
that shocked the entire continent. It was declared to be the work of
an exiled member of the imperial family.
On the other hand, it became public that the demon Deathpolca's
true identity was Saint Bohelos. News quickly spread throughout
the continent and reached the Kingdom of Bohelos.
Their founding saint was a demon. Those who heard the news
were shocked, doubtful, saddened, and regretful. The Kingdom
of Bohelos was once again thrown into turmoil.
During the commotion, Lily Killer disappeared. Where she went
The berserker drug incident... One mistake and demonkind would
The bond between the slave knight and the demons had been
severed, but her sins were forgiven by her friends, and they
In Kumin, it was made known that Saint Bohelos was a demon and
that she stopped the Magic Cannon. After some deliberation, it was
decided that control of the country would be given to the demons.
\#The Neutral Republic of Kumin falls to the demons.
Eternal Dolls... Mysterious women who showed up in the throne
room of the Third Empire. Among them was the serial killer who
had been involved in the demons' fight from the very beginning.
With their appearance, the situation had drastically changed. As
long as the Empire had access to the Eternal Dolls, it would be
extremely difficult for the demons and slaves to achieve victory.
The Eternal Dolls supposedly came from Holy Land Pacius. It was
barely anything to go off of, but in order to find out the truth,
Deathpolca and her party made Pacius their next destination.
Holy Land Pacius... Behind its righteous, holy facade was a country
that birthed a deep, dark abyss.
The Sage of Wisdom was killed by Apostle Deathpolca, but if
his death had been allowed to stand, chaos was inevitable.
The demons and slaves would be met by a terrible hatred.
Aware of that fact, a demon volunteered to fuse with the Sage.
Quelling the disorder, they were able to effectively control Pacius.
\#Holy Land Pacius falls to the demons.
The battle for succession... Around the same time the demons
were invading the Kingdom of Bohelos, a tragedy was unfolding
Betrayed by the half-brother he thought he could trust,
Najezta was thrown into slavery and lost his mother.
At long last, that irredeemable battle had a conclusion.
The Third Empire lost its ruler. The demons dispatched
a brainwashing squad and quickly established control,
greatly excited to have conquered part of the Empire.
Several days later, a letter from the Empire arrived at Bohelos's
Estate. A contract penned by the Emperor himself. Knowing he
meant his word, an enormous pressure fell over Deathpolca.
\#The Third Empire falls to the demons.
The Emperor's wedding... The announcement was widely celebrated
by royalty, aristocrats, and even commoners across the continent.
As the Emperor's number of wives increased, the limit on polygamy
increased. Due to this system, men of high status rejoiced each and
every time the Emperor was wed.
To celebrate the Emperor's wedding, festivals and sales
were held and subsidized by the Empire. For this reason,
A few days later, the wedding would be held. It would be broadcast
throughout the continent via magic device, so that all humanity
could see the Emperor and the woman who would become his wife.
The slave army that clashed with the Imperial Knights was
outnumbered twenty to one. Eight people charged into the
Imperial Palace alone. Seventeen demons backed them up.
With those meager numbers, the demons and slaves defeated the
Empire. They took down the Emperor, Kudan, and the White
Phantoms. They had finally achieved world domination.
\#The continent is freed from Bless Curse's curse.
Ultra Beasts... The biggest, strongest creatures on the continent.
It remains unclear to this day why these fearsome beasts would
hand over control of the continent to the humans they could so
There's no way of knowing why Ultra Beast Gon chose this time to
The joint effort between demons and humans succeeded in driving
the Ultra Beast from its territory, a great achievement that had no
precedent in all of recorded history.
\#The Palo Mountain Range falls to the demons.
The continent. A series of interconnected nations, cultures,
and histories that support life. The land of humans.
It is a cruel place. The surrounding lands are inhabited by giant
creatures known as Ultra Beasts. On occasion, they bare their
fangs and attack mankind, which is powerless to stop them.
Then there are all the natural disasters. Divine winds and lightning
that snatch lives away. Even at this very moment, the continent is
The Demon Lord's invasion. Every thousand years, an army
of demons appears on the continent. They attack mankind
with terrifying ferocity, intent on taking over the world.
But this time, the invasion was so weak it was almost pitiful.
Their very survival on the line, the demons staged an attack on the
Kingdom of Bohelos. Paying no heed to their disparity in strength,
they sacrificed many of their comrades to narrowly grasp victory.
Nearly one thousand years after the Demon Lord's defeat, the demons
returned to the bright world they had long dreamed of. From Bohelos,
the curtain would rise on their grand struggle.
\#The Kingdom of Bohelos falls to the demons.
The incidents have occurred in three countries near Bohelos,
and their citizens appear to be in an uproar.
Why is that causing entire countries to panic?
To put it simply, the victims are killed in extremely gruesome
The culprit's said to have been captured, but the panic's yet to die
down, and the nations in question remain disorganized.
So they have bigger problems on their hands than Bohelos being
Far above the continent, demons took flight at incredible speed.
Their wings tasted the freedom of the open skies for the first time
in hundreds of years. They flew without rest as though to display
Their destination was the Kingdom of Tortas. It was a small,
impoverished nation with little military strength to speak of,
but within it resided the sworn enemy of all demonkind.
Deathpolca had simulated this battle time and time again.
The frightful image of her foe was burned into her mind,
but it was soon scattered by her terrible motion sickness.
After driving out the serial killer, Deathpolca deemed her a threat
and ensured she was prohibited from entering demon territory.
Lily Killer vanished, and the chaos she caused was slowly replaced
by peace. However, the fear never fully disappeared from the back
Days passed, and the demons consolidated their control over the
\#The Kingdom of Tortas falls to the demons.
With the slave knight Ange in tow, Deathpolca set off for
DoReMi Fuckingdom... A very unusual country, and one notable
The demons were struggling from lack of funds, and DoReMi had a
unique way of earning money. In addition, the information traded
there would prove invaluable in their world conquest.
A few days after leaving Bohelos, Deathpolca and Ange arrived
The Kingdom of Savagery, Shingana... A cruel nation that grew by
At the border, the Demon Army led by Todeira was preparing for war.
In order to find out the truth, Deathpolca hurried to meet him.
At her side was a slave knight wearing an uneasy expression.
After brainwashing the King of Shingana, the demons immediately
called for a ceasefire, ending the war. Although both sides suffered
News that the demons were responsible for slaughtering the people
of Bohelos quickly spread throughout the continent, causing major
damage to the relationship between humans and demons.
A few days later, the demons consolidated their control over the
\#The Kingdom of Savagery, Shingana falls to the demons.
This is Merchant Kingdom Plana. It's just above Shingana.
They border demon territory, so it'd be good to keep them in check
Once every four years, they host a spectacle called the Saint Coliseum.
Teams of slaves compete in several different events, and the last
team standing earns the right to challenge the king!
So the reward for winning is a fight with the king, huh?
Do you get a valuable reward for beating him? Is that why you've been
The reward is the country itself! We can't let this chance slip by!
Huuuh!? You get the entire country!?
Is that really the reward? They'd have to surrender the country
I don't mean to rain on your parade, but I don't buy it.
At first it may have just been a lie to attract attention,
but now it's become the country's biggest spectacle.
People and money flood in, and the entire continent has its eyes on
them. There's no way they can go back on their word now.
If we win, we should at least temporarily gain control of the country,
and that's all the time we need to brainwash them.
That's still a pretty big problem. I doubt they have any intention of
The king likely has a bunch of tricks prepared to ensure he wins.
We can go over the rules once we get there.
There's still time before it begins. We can visit other countries
I've heard reports of shady happenings in Tortas and Shingana.
We could also visit DoReMi and purchase some more info.
I never wanna go there again.
The Saint Coliseum ended in the king's defeat, and in accordance
with the rules, the gladiators earned the right to rule Plana.
However, gladiators who only knew how to fight weren't capable
of leading a nation. Under Deathpolca's guidance, Plana's royal
family was brainwashed and made to work for them.
The gladiators and demons came to trust one another. Eventually
the right to govern the country was officially transferred over to
demonkind, and Merchant Kingdom Plana became demon territory.
Meanwhile, it was decided that the birthplace of this tragedy,
the coliseum, would continue to operate as an arena where
\#Merchant Kingdom Plana falls to the demons.
We only just took over Plana, but I want to investigate Rooklook now.
I thought we concluded there was no way we could attack them?
We did, but something's bothering me... I want to go see
So this is our next destination...
Rooklook divides the southern portion of the continent in half.
Their walls prevent us from gathering intel on the southeast.
The state of affairs within their walls is unknown as well. I'm really
hoping this investigation will give us a hint as to how to invade.
Then I'll go on ahead and eliminate any potential danger.
You girls follow when you're ready.
If you want to go back to Bohelos's Estate, have a demon take you
A powerful nation that stands atop a steep cliff face, known for their
Her Majesty's price immediately shot through the roof, and one of
the King of Tolkia's envoys ended up placing the winning bid.
Trying to buy up a former queen at any cost, huh? Nice hobby
For the record, I sold for the second-highest price.
Why do you sound proud of that? Wipe that smug look off your face.
Tolkia is a particularly troublesome nation. Even trying to speak
with the queen would be no simple task.
Dragons patrol the skies above, so we can't have the gardemons
carry us all the way there.
To begin with, we don't even know if the queen's still alive.
We could be wasting our time.
Even after it was clear we'd lost, Her Majesty personally fought
against Shingana to give her people time to flee.
When I saw her again at the slave market, her eyes looked dead,
crushed under the weight of her guilt...
If there's any chance she's still alive, I'd like to save her, but...
That day, a group of girls suddenly appeared inside Tolkia Castle.
They rescued the defeated Queen of Lace and overthrew the King
of Tolkia, claiming the country in the name of demonkind.
Tolkia's rules began to change. The dragons were driven out,
and the slaves who had been used to bait the dragons into
combat were freed when the dangerous practice was banned.
The dragons would no longer be forced to fight or participate in
wars. Both dragons and slaves obtained peace for the first time.
Though some welcomed the changes, the quality of life of the free
citizens declined. Hostility towards the demons grew ever stronger.
\#The Kingdom of Tolkia falls to the demons.
At that time, an army that had amassed to the east of Rooklook had
They were the Human Liberation Army. An elite force of knights
from various countries. At last, humanity had made a full-scale
Deathpolca hurried back to Bohelos's Estate. In the event of a crisis,
she had issued orders that information was to be gathered there.
Carried by a gardemon, she looked down to see Bohelos Castle
surrounded by a sea of flames. The battle had already begun!
Kishe Calendar Year 939... Humans and demons came head to head
in their first large-scale clash. The Human Liberation Army had
the advantage at the start, but it ended in demonkind's victory.
The Human Liberation Army was unable to break through Remnant
Todeira's ironclad defense and coordination with the brainwashed
soldiers. The magic landmines also played a major role.
The Human Liberation Army lost their icon, the commander
of the Bohelos Knights. When that news spread through the
continent, mankind was filled with a sense of loss and fury.
On the demons' end, Remnant Claura was gravely wounded, while
Remnant Mebius had been forced to fuse with a human to narrowly
escape death. Neither side could be called the victor.
Demonkind lost Remnant Mebius, the core of their military
strength and a crucial member of their invasion force. The
rain falling upon Bohelos grew ever more gray and heavy.
Despite that, their battle continued... and continued...
They repaired their destroyed walls and arms. They brainwashed
their prisoners and prepared anew for attacks to come.
Months passed before Bohelos's defenses were once again in place.
In the meantime, humanity's hostility toward the demons grew by
the day. Defeating the Liberation Army had made them despised.
Time passed, and countermeasures against the Empire were never
found. Before long, it would be two full years since the demons
Aubades... Objects, culture, and people from another world. These
foreign objects have existed on the continent since ancient times.
And yet, the appearance of such a large number of Aubades
was unprecedented. And because they had no way to return
home, there was much debate about what they should do.
Meanwhile, the major powers of the Empire and Maximus watched
the situation carefully. Only the Aubades who rejected the demons
were offered shelter in their countries.
In the end, the Aubades who elected to coexist with the demons
came to govern Mark 6 autonomously. Although it was not
officially announced, Mark 6 became demon territory.
Maximus is right here. The second-largest nation on the continent,
and one that holds close ties with the Empire.
They have an even more powerful magic barrier than Rooklook.
There's no way to enter without permission.
Which means your typical strategy of infiltrating with small numbers
and taking down the king isn't going to work here.
Figures major powers would have tight defenses. Add that to all the
other problems we're facing and the whole situation's a mess.
\{\#I have a brilliant idea to turn
At long last, the demons and slaves succeeded in conquering
By taking control of the mana storage facility in Maximus
where the students' other halves were being held, they
were able to liberate Rooklook in its entirety.
Orphe was liberated at well. The imperial soldiers were driven out
and their rules abolished. Using slaves and Ultra Beasts for mining
The demons freed the south half of the continent from the
major powers. A great number of commonfolk complained,
but the slaves enjoyed their newly regained freedom.
\#The southern half of the continent falls to the demons.
